reviews.comment:
La mina que atiende el YPF full es una mal educada. Mala onda. Es la segunda vez que vengo y te contesta de muy mala manera. No vengo mas. Trabaja a la medianoche.
PE 4185 TN1
Nro T 00155346
28/4/19  1:53 hs

(Translated by Google)
The woman who works at the YPF gas station is rude. She's awful. This is the second time I've come here and she's been incredibly rude. I'm not coming back. She works until midnight.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y trabajo bien hecho y Buenos precios. La parte de mecánica y todo lo que sea taller es solo para socios.  Combustible y venta de aceites y otras cosas para el vehículo es para todos.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, well-done work, and good prices. The mechanics and all other workshop services are available to members only. Fuel, oil, and other vehicle supplies are available to everyone.
